 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pvs","title":"Implement web app unit tests (apps/web/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test React components render correctly
- Test hooks (useLocalStorage, useBasket)
- Test search integration
- Test copy-to-clipboard functionality
- Test keyboard navigation in SpotlightSearch

**Component Tests:**
- PromptCard: renders all fields, handles expansion, copy works
- PromptGrid: responsive layout, basket integration
- SpotlightSearch: keyboard nav, search debounce, selection
- BasketSidebar: add/remove, export buttons, persistence
- CategoryFilter/TagFilter: selection state, URL sync

**Hook Tests:**
- useLocalStorage: persistence, hydration
- useBasket: add/remove/clear, context propagation

**Framework:** Vitest + @testing-library/react + happy-dom

**Test Organization:**
```
apps/web/__tests__/
  components/
    prompt-card.test.tsx
    spotlight-search.test.tsx
    basket-sidebar.test.tsx
  hooks/
    use-local-storage.test.ts
    use-basket.test.ts
  lib/
    search-engine.test.ts
```

**Reasoning:** Component tests catch UI regressions. Hook tests ensure state management works. Critical for maintaining UX quality across changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:31.273796804-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:12:59.883387661-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:12:59.883387661-05:00","close_reason":"Added unit tests for useLocalStorage hook (15 tests), BasketContext (13 tests), and PromptCard component (22 tests).  {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-rnm","title":"Implement useLocalStorage hook","description":"**Details:**
- Generic hook for localStorage persistence
- SSR-safe (handles hydration)
- Type-safe with generics
- Used by: basket, theme, variable inputs, preferences

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts
'use client';

export function useLocalStorage<T>(key: string, initialValue: T) {
  // State to store our value
  const [storedValue, setStoredValue] = useState<T>(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return initialValue;
    try {
      const item = localStorage.getItem(key);
      return item ? JSON.parse(item) : initialValue;
    } catch {
      return initialValue;
    }
  });

  // Persist to localStorage on change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return;
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(storedValue));
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to save to localStorage:', error);
    }
  }, [key, storedValue]);

  return [storedValue, setStoredValue] as const;
}
```

**SSR Handling:**
- Initial render uses provided default
- useEffect syncs with localStorage after hydration
- Prevents hydration mismatch errors

**Location:** apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts

**Reasoning:** Many features need persistent state (basket, theme, variable inputs). Centralizing localStorage logic in a hook ensures consistent behavior and SSR safety.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:35.714509321-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:46.164609393-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:44:46.164609393-05:00","close_reason":"Added apps/web/src/hooks/use-local-storage.ts SSR-safe localStorage hook"}
